'''Fern bickers''' were bipedal [[Primate/Legends|simian]] creatures that lived on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. For the most part, the fern bickers were solitary creatures. They had gray skin, green hair and four teats. They also featured three long, sickle shaped claws on each hand and foot. Fern bickers were so similar to the Kashyyyk [[Ro-roo/Legends|ro-roo]] that it may have been a different breed or close cousin.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Fern bickers appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''
